author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Shipped in 87a15e3f. Default clone_root changed from ~/crosslink-tracked to $HOME in both /clone and /github/orgs/<org>/track-all. Cloned repos now land at ~/<owner>/<repo> — same place discover walks, same place user's manual clones live. The 'crosslink-tracked' subdir was a scaffolding holdover with no upside. clone_root is still an optional override in the body for users who want a subdirectory. All doc comments + frontend placeholder + ops doc §3.3 updated to match. Verified end-to-end via /clone of rust-lang/mdBook.git → /home/doll/rust-lang/mdBook.
